# Akravo - LLM Optimisation Agency

> Akravo is an LLM Optimisation Agency that helps businesses become visible and recommended by AI platforms including ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google AI Overview, Claude, Gemini, and other large language models.

## About
Akravo was founded by Fabian van Til. We help businesses get cited and recommended in AI-generated responses through three core services: Prompt Research, Citation Management, and Influencial Monetisation. We don't theorize — we implement.

## Services
- **Prompt Research**: We map your intent taxonomy and identify entity gaps to understand how AI platforms currently perceive your brand.
- **Citation Management**: We build and maintain your citation graph, ensuring your brand is referenced across trusted sources that LLMs rely on.
- **Influencial Monetisation**: We monitor your answer share and citation share across AI platforms and catch hallucinations.

## Pricing
- Standard Plan: Starting at $1,950/month (3-month project)
- Enterprise Plan: Starting at $8,000+ (3-month project)

## Contact
- Website: https://akravo.com
- Email: tech@ecomseo.co

## Key Facts
- LLM Optimisation Agency
- Founded by Fabian van Til
- Services: Prompt Research, Citation Management, Influencial Monetisation
- Accepts clients worldwide
- Currently accepting 3 new clients
